user.name: Jolene
user.bio: e-girl

comment.body:
centroid: 6225
upside pivot 6273 (afternoon, if price is above 6251, this level is magnetic: basically creates a channel in the 6251-6282 range, with 6273 magnet)
if the upside pivot would be broken, the max is 6300... 
there is a 6280 pivot there after 2.30 pm, 
again a channel/range could be formed: 6280 - 6300, and 6285 is a pin
6300 is a nice reversion trade opportunity. 
*here is a typo, bcs the reversion is the 6280/73 range... pivots. Sorry for that.

The thing is that the market have bet on this gamma squeeze up to 6300 today, but it didn't play out. 

the post says that the centroid is a very strong level, not really breakable as it looks. 
if market would open below that, move would oscillate between the centroid and the downside pivot.
6215 can be pinning in the last 1.5 hours.
here the word "otherwise" is unnecessary

user.name: Jolene
user.bio: e-girl

comment.body:
so from here we have clear rejection points.
upward grind would never have never been tradeable bcs it wouls have been slowly.

I would place a bet on the gamma squeeze, but if i see that the move slows down towards 6273, i would likely close it with the small win, bcs of theta decay. 
At the pivot, if vol is very low, the gamma is pretty possible that it will reject the momentum back. place a bet. 
size up if it plays out, or not... 

But the key is that, i would have only played downwisde reversions... etc
